annual_net_revenue.description: The annual net revenue of the business (must be greater than 0)

zip_code.description: The ZIP code for location-based salary calculations

occupations.description: Array of occupations. Time percentages must sum to 100%.

code.description: Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) occupation code

time_percentage.description: Percentage of time spent in this occupation (as decimal, e.g., 0.5 = 50%)

primary.description: Whether this is the primary occupation
